evals.prompt: Run a SWOT analysis for a B2B SaaS company entering the project management market. We have strong enterprise sales relationships, deep workflow integration expertise, and $10M ARR in adjacent markets. The market is crowded with Asana, Monday, Jira, and Linear competing on features. We're a late entrant.
evals.expected_output: A swot-analysis.md artifact committed to the resolved layout path with frontmatter type: swot-analysis. The SWOT covers four quadrants with at least three entries per quadrant, each specific and sourced (not generic). Strategic implications section covers SO, ST, WO, and WT pairs (at least one each). The synthesis explicitly names an adoption hypothesis: which SO pair translates into a first-success event, and what that first-success event is (a specific customer behavior, not 'user signs up'). The synthesis explicitly names a differentiation mechanism: the structural advantage that makes the position defensible (not a generic 'we'll be better' claim). The scope, time horizon, and competitive reference point are stated upfront. No strategy decisions or OKR targets appear — SWOT maps the situation.
assertions: Strengths are internal capabilities — not market conditions or external trends; at least three named
Weaknesses are direct and specific — not softened; at least one names a genuine competitive disadvantage
Opportunities reference an evidence source (PESTLE output, competitor move, market research) — not generic trends
Threats name a time horizon (near-term / medium-term) for at least two entries
Strategic implications section covers all four pair types: SO, ST, WO, WT with at least one entry each
Adoption hypothesis is named: which opportunity-strength pair produces a first-success event, and what that event is behaviorally
Differentiation mechanism is named: a specific structural advantage (switching cost, network effect, data advantage, proprietary capability) — not a generic quality claim
The scope and competitive reference point are stated at the start
No OKR targets, no strategy decisions, no implementation plans appear — SWOT is a situation map
The artifact is committed to the resolved path with frontmatter type: swot-analysis; path is surfaced before writing
